name: dhu_screencapture_macos
description: macOS only: capture full screen or region (pass -R x,y,w,h) to PNG for Desktop Head Unit documentation. Not for unattended CI.

screencapture_args.description: Extra args to screencapture before output path, e.g. ["-R","0,0,1024,768"]

suggested_invocation.notes: Forward screencapture_args as argv; default captures full main display.
